form.formComment: Can settle forward and she showed improvement to place in her last two runs including finished 2nd in a Grade 4 on April 4 over 300m at this track behind Just A Joy beaten a nose (17.61). form.formComment: Nearing another win after his success on February 21 at The Gardens over 400m. Last start was fifth over 300m in 17.98, behind Just A Joy. Safe beginner and will give a great sight.

form.formComment: Finished fifth (17.90) last start at Richmond Straight. Prior to that had recorded three minor placings in a row. Tough draw to overcome and appears tested on latest effort.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 3.5 lengths in 17.61, beating Lady Rico. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 4/5 on April 1 over 300m at this track behind At The Gate beaten 4.5 lengths (17.69). Can't enthuse on this occasion.
